3088560.name: Sunrise Down
3088560.description:
Sunrise Down is a captivating collection of unique and engaging puzzles. Featuring a diverse array of puzzle types, including:
  • Spatial Reasoning
  • Logic
  • Cryptology
  • Memory

The puzzles vary in difficulty from easy to extremely challenging, offering something for every puzzle enthusiast.
Guided by your host, Antisthenes, you'll not only solve puzzles but also delve into intriguing philosophical discussions. Embark on this intellectual journey and see if you can conquer all the challenges Sunrise Down has to offer.



Good luck.
3088560.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
